name: wow-contact-form
description: Contact form wired to Shopify's native /contact endpoint via the {% form 'contact' %} Liquid tag — automatic CSRF token. Required fields: name, email, message. Optional toggleable fields: phone (with tel-pattern validation), subject. Two layout modes: single-column (every field stacked) and two-column (name + email side-by-side via CSS Grid from 600px up; phone + subject also paired when both are enabled; message always full-width). Pre-fills name + email from the logged-in customer when available. On successful submission renders the merchant-set success message via form.posted_successfully?; on validation error renders an alert region (role='alert') listing every form.errors translated field. Includes the full UI Element Settings Standard: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading, §8.3 button settings (with all five hover effects), §8.6 background, §8.8 layout (content_alignment, content_position, content_max_width default 700, section_width), §8.9 universal (hide_on_mobile, hide_on_desktop, custom_css). Independent input styling block + form_max_width slider (400-900, default 700). Always-visible labels with required-indicator asterisk on name/email/message; focus-visible 3px box-shadow ring on every input + submit. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets with brand-tailored copy.
